title: Phenomenon 28
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:The Necro-Broadcast}}
{{Notice|body=This page is better read in dark mode.}}
==Description== {{Blurimage|file=tvghostgirl.jpg|caption=Phenomenon 28 being used to show a ghost.|hovertext=Recordings of the slain. The last time you will see them again.}} '''Phenomenon 28''', or simply the '''Necro-Broadcast''' is an anomaly during October 31st that permanently gives radios and televisions the anomalous power to speak to, hear and even see ghosts of both wanderers and entities that have died on the level that '''Object 28''' is in. While it is estimated that only 0.2% of all devices will gain these changes, considering how large the Backrooms is and that some levels may revolve around certain themes like electronics; there is a good chance that a wanderer may accidentally find equipment altered by the '''Necro-Broadcast'''. If the object is damaged in any shape or form, (this excludes small scratches) then '''Phenomenon 28''' is nullified, even if it goes under repair. Often times, a loud, distorted scream is heard on destruction; however, it is proven from tests that the souls that interact by the '''Necro-Broadcast''' don't feel pain if their means of communication is destroyed. Instead it is the machine itself that causes this ear-piercing sound. Due to this, it is advised to not take devices enhanced by '''Phenomenon 28''' as it is fragile and might alert unwanted attention near the owner. [[Jack-O-Lanterns|Jack-o-lanterns]] and even the [[The Halloween Demon|Halloween Demon]] will destroy any machinery affected by '''Phenomenon 28''' if they realise that there is a human soul making contact with the realm of the living. [[Entity 9|facelings]] can express many types of emotions when seeing the spirits using the '''Necro-Broadcast'''. Sometimes, entities are seen crying as they seemingly talk to dead relatives or allies. If an entity finds that they are talking to a wanderer that was slain by them, they will appear distressed as the spirit beings to torment them. It was observed that spirits that appear enraged by an observer will "leave" the broadcast to haunt their target of hatred. These vengeful spirits will no longer be seen on any instance of '''Phenomenon 28'''. While it might be undesirable for the most part, if a ghost that has no ill will against you becomes the host of the '''Necro-Broadcast''', it might become beneficial as they can give information about surroundings or give warnings based on how they died to listeners. In some cases, where the phantom is much stronger, they may even give critical information such as secrets, blessings, curses and even foresee the future. ==Spirit Perspective== The interviewed dead (mainly souls who don't respond with "You will find out eventually.") had gave insights on how the object appears to them and how it works. If a ghost can't enter the afterlife for some reason in the Backrooms, they may wander down the halls of the level they died on, sometimes even being able to enter other levels. When '''Phenomenon 28''' occurs, they feel a strong presence in the general location of the affected object. The affected equipment will glow a neon cyan-marine colour while making the surrounding area appear warped. On touching the anomaly, they will instantly gain knowledge of how it operates and gain full power to change what is shown on screen or change the audio. They can stop interacting with the '''Necro-Broadcast''' at will. Sometimes, multiple users can haunt the equipment, sometimes only one however they will anomalously know the limit of how much souls can communicate using the '''Necro-Broadcast'''. It is unknown what happens to the souls that leave to haunt someone. Interviews have proven to be unreliable as even other supernatural forces have no idea where they go, it is assumed that they are able to enter the afterlife at this point.





























In shadows we will roam, watching you listen to us all alone.. Right now you're not a ghost, eventually this radio will invite you as its host.. To communicate with the unseen.. one last message..
